name: KeyCDN Content Delivery Network API
what_it_does: Performance-focused content delivery network with REST API — enabling developers to distribute static assets, media files, and web content globally via HTTP/2, Brotli compression, and modern CDN features, with zone-based configuration, real-time analytics, image optimization, and a developer-friendly API for programmatic CDN management at competitive pricing.
use_cases: Creating and managing CDN zones via KeyCDN API for static asset distribution automation
Purging cached content via KeyCDN API for deployment and content update pipelines
Configuring KeyCDN zones with custom headers, SSL, and cache rules via REST API
Querying CDN bandwidth usage and analytics via KeyCDN API for billing and performance monitoring
Managing origin pull zones and push zones via KeyCDN API for content distribution configuration
not_for: Edge compute (KeyCDN is CDN only — no serverless edge functions)
Video streaming platform features (use Mux or Cloudflare Stream for video)
Enterprise WAF and DDoS mitigation (use Cloudflare or Fastly for advanced security)
best_when: A developer or small team needs a cost-effective, straightforward CDN for static assets and media distribution — with pay-as-you-go pricing and a simple API for programmatic zone management.
avoid_when: You need edge compute, advanced WAF, real-time streaming, or enterprise SLA with dedicated support.

auth.notes: API key from KeyCDN account. HTTP Basic auth with API key as username. Account-scoped access. No webhooks. REST API for zone, asset, and analytics management. HTTP/2, Brotli, and Zopfli compression. Image optimization via Optimizer feature. No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes — API key provides full account access.

pricing.paid_tiers: Pay-as-you-go from $0.04/GB; Volume discounts; no monthly minimums for basic
pricing.notes: Swiss company (Zurich). Founded 2012. Bootstrapped and profitable. Simple, affordable CDN with competitive pricing. Pay-as-you-go with no monthly minimums. 35+ global PoPs. HTTP/2, HTTP/3 (QUIC), Brotli compression. Image optimization add-on. Let's Encrypt SSL included. Strong in developer and SMB market. Not enterprise-scale like Akamai or Cloudflare. Simple pricing model — $0.04/GB for North America/Europe, varying for other regions. Swiss company with GDPR-first design.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for zone and analytics management. HTTP Basic auth with API key as username. Good documentation for zone management and cache purging. No webhooks. Rate limit 1,000 API calls/day — very restrictive for frequent purge operations. Swiss company with GDPR compliance. Credit card required for signup.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Zone reads fully idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by time range. Zone creation not idempotent — check by label. Cache purge is idempotent (same URL, same result).
known_agent_gotchas: API rate limit 1,000 calls/day — very restrictive for frequent operations (batch purge carefully)
HTTP Basic auth with API key as username — not standard bearer token pattern
No webhooks — must poll for cache status and analytics
Credit card required at signup — no free trial without payment method
Simple CDN — no edge compute or advanced security features

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. Multi-region data residency. HTTP Basic auth (weaker than Bearer token). Swiss company with GDPR-first design. HTTP Basic auth with API key — use HTTPS only (never HTTP). No OAuth2 or scope granularity — API key provides full account access. Let's Encrypt SSL for zone domains. DDoS protection is basic compared to enterprise CDNs.
